prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO6IGGS-SML-GRN Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Emergency Glow Stick BOB High Visibility Night Vision, 6 inch Green Description: Light your way in an emergency situation with the ASR Outdoor Green Glow Stick.

This emergency glow stick will last for up to 12 hours. It's super easy to use - just snap it and shake it for instant light. The glow stick is about 6" in length and 15mm thick, so it will fit in just about any pocket, purse or bug out bag. It even comes with a red lanyard so you can wear it around your neck, attach it to your belt loop or your backpack. Don't get caught in the dark without a few of these. Search Terms: glow sticks road safety universal safety safety stick Features: - ASR Outdoor Emergency Glow Stick - Bright Green - Lasts Up to 12 Hours - Dimensions: 6" L | 15mm Thick - Simple to Use - Just Shake & Snap for Instant Light === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6 inch Green Emergency Glow Stick

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6in Green Emergency Glow Stick

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lasts Up To 12 Hours, Snap And Shake For Instant Light, High Visibility Night Safety, Red Lanyard Included

openai.title_differentiation: Lasts Up To 12 Hours, Snap And Shake Activation, 6 Inch Compact Size, Includes Red Lanyard, High Visibility
